Uses of Class
org.moeaframework.core.variable.RealVariable

Packages that use RealVariable
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.core.operator.real
Collection of operators for real-encoded variables.
org.moeaframework.core.variable
Defines the various decision variables that may be used.

  • Uses of RealVariable in org.moeaframework.core.operator.real

    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.operator.real with parameters of type RealVariable
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    SBX.evolve_asymmetric(RealVariable v1, RealVariable v2, double distributionIndex)
    Evolves the specified variables using the SBX operator using asymmetric distributions.
    static void
    SBX.evolve_symmetric(RealVariable v1, RealVariable v2, double distributionIndex)
    Evolves the specified variables using the SBX operator using symmetric distributions.
    void
    PM.mutate(RealVariable v)
    Mutates the specified variable using polynomial mutation.
    void
    UM.mutate(RealVariable variable)
    Mutates the specified variable using uniform mutation.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RealVariable
    RealVariable.copy()
     
    static RealVariable
    EncodingUtils.newInt(int lowerBound, int upperBound)
    Returns a new integer-valued decision variable bounded within the specified range.
    static RealVariable
    EncodingUtils.newReal(double lowerBound, double upperBound)
    Returns a new floating-point decision variable bounded within the specified range.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    EncodingUtils.decode(BinaryVariable binary, RealVariable real)
    Decodes the specified binary variable into its real value.
    static void
    EncodingUtils.encode(RealVariable real, BinaryVariable binary)
    Encodes the specified real variable into a binary variable.
